title: HR1 1RY, Dwr Cymru Cyfyngedig: environmental permit issued - EPR/UP3735GH/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Dwr Cymru Cyfyngedig   Installation name: Eign Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/UP3735GH/V003   "
